textPlain: This is amazing work. Most people don’t realize how much effort and depth there is behind writing a TCP/IP stack and plugging it into xv6 with virtio-net and sockets. Huge respect for making it public. Projects like this are gold for those of us who love low-level systems.

Are you using any RISC-V extensions? If so, which? I couldn't find this information on the xv6 project page.
It would be cool if you could run this project in bare metal.
Well done! Thank you for sharing
